SessionStart.command: ROOT=docs; if [ ! -f docs/plan/backlog.yaml ] && [ -f docs/plan/backlog.yaml ]; then ROOT=docs; fi; if [ -f ${ROOT}/plan/backlog.yaml ]; then echo '=== BACKLOG STATE ==='; head -80 ${ROOT}/plan/backlog.yaml; echo; echo '=== SESSION LOG (last 10) ==='; tail -10 ${ROOT}/plan/session-log.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No previous session'; fi

SubagentStop.command: ROOT=docs; if [ ! -f docs/plan/backlog.yaml ] && [ -f docs/plan/backlog.yaml ]; then ROOT=docs; fi; echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) | Subagent completed" >> ${ROOT}/plan/session-log.md 2>/dev/null || true
